dimensions.name: Calm Surface
dimensions.prompt: Rate the visual calmness of this interface. A calm surface is mostly neutral with accent color used sparingly. The eye should rest, not bounce. Consider: number of distinct colors visible, ratio of neutral to accent, visual noise level.

scale.anchor_high: Serene, accent draws eye precisely where needed

dimensions.name: Clear Hierarchy
dimensions.prompt: Rate the visual hierarchy. Squint at the screenshot — can you immediately identify 3-4 levels of importance? Is the most important element (key metric, primary action) the most visually prominent?

scale.anchor_low: Everything same weight, no focal point
scale.anchor_high: Instantly clear what matters most, 3-4 distinct levels

dimensions.name: Typographic Rhythm
dimensions.prompt: Evaluate the typography. Is there a consistent scale? Do headings, body, and captions form a clear progression? Is line length comfortable? Is spacing between text blocks consistent?

scale.anchor_low: Inconsistent sizes, poor spacing, uncomfortable to read
scale.anchor_high: Beautiful rhythm, clear scale, every text element feels intentional

dimensions.name: Spatial Breathing
dimensions.prompt: Assess whitespace and breathing room. Is content given enough space to be parsed without effort? Are groups of related items clearly separated from unrelated items? Does the layout feel spacious without feeling empty?

scale.anchor_low: Cramped, elements touching, no breathing room
scale.anchor_high: Generous, intentional whitespace, clear grouping through space

dimensions.name: State Clarity
dimensions.prompt: Can you identify the current state of interactive elements? Are hover targets clear? Do buttons look clickable? Are disabled states obviously disabled? Loading states present?

scale.anchor_low: States ambiguous, can't tell what's interactive
scale.anchor_high: Every state obvious, interaction model clear at a glance

dimensions.name: Consistent Density
dimensions.prompt: Is information density consistent across the view? Are similar sections equally dense? No areas that feel much tighter or looser than their neighbors?

scale.anchor_high: Uniform density, every section feels calibrated to the same standard

dimensions.name: Motion Purpose
dimensions.prompt: If any animations or transitions are visible/implied, do they serve information or feedback purposes? No gratuitous effects?

scale.anchor_high: Every motion carries meaning or provides feedback

dimensions.name: Component Cohesion
dimensions.prompt: Do all components look like they belong to the same design system? Consistent border radius, shadow treatment, padding, button styles?

scale.anchor_low: Components from different design systems, inconsistent
scale.anchor_high: Every component clearly from the same family

dimensions.name: Data Legibility
dimensions.prompt: Are numbers, charts, tables, and data immediately scannable? Do key metrics stand out? Is data density appropriate — not too sparse, not overwhelming?

scale.anchor_low: Data hard to parse, metrics buried
scale.anchor_high: Data jumps off the screen, instantly scannable

dimensions.name: Congruent Trust
dimensions.prompt: Does this interface feel honest and trustworthy? Not over-polished to the point of seeming fake, not under-designed to seem unprofessional? Would a prospective customer trust this product?

scale.anchor_high: Inspires quiet confidence, feels like a tool built by experts

rubric.overall_prompt: After rating each dimension, provide an overall polish score (1-10) and 2-3 specific, actionable suggestions for the single most impactful improvement.
